snapshots.description: Full catalog screen on first render — section header, category chips, pizza grid with localized names + add-to-cart labels. Captured at scenario end; baselines bucket by (market, language) via the visual hook's options payload, so US/en, MX/es, CH/de, CH/fr, JP/ja each get a distinct baseline path. This 2-tag snapshot fires on every @visual catalog scenario today (none carry @search/@filter/@card), so it doubles as the catch-all visual signal for search-cleared and filter-cleared end states too.

Catalog after a search query has narrowed the visible grid (e.g. only Pepperoni cards). Future expansion — activated when a feature scenario carries the @search tag. The visual hook's longest-tag-match rule keeps this entry dormant until then; it lives in the contract now so adding the tag in a future PR doesn't also require a contract change.

Catalog after a category chip has narrowed the visible grid (e.g. only classic pizzas). Future expansion — activated when a feature scenario carries the @filter tag. Same dormancy contract as catalog_search_results.
